home.hero.eyebrow.label: Home hero eyebrow
home.hero.eyebrow.value: Game servers with people behind them

home.hero.body.label: Home hero text
home.hero.body.value: We host the servers, keep an eye on things, and build the kind of game nights people actually want to come back to.

home.section.title.label: Home section title
home.section.title.value: Jump in, check the status, or help decide what comes next

home.discord.title.label: Discord CTA title
home.discord.title.value: Want updates, support, and event planning in one place?

home.discord.body.label: Discord CTA text
home.discord.body.value: Join the Discord for announcements, help, suggestions, and the day-to-day Most Wanted Network chatter.

status.services.body.label: Status services text
status.services.body.value: If something is configured for public checks, it shows up here automatically.

news.hero.body.label: News page text
news.hero.body.value: Short updates for new servers, wipes, events, maintenance, and the small changes players should know about.

about.hero.title.label: About page title
about.hero.title.value: A small network for players who like things handled properly

about.hero.body.label: About page text
about.hero.body.value: Most Wanted Network is our place for hosting games, trying new ideas, and keeping the community close enough that people recognize each other.

suggestions.hero.title.label: Suggestions page title
suggestions.hero.title.value: Got an idea? Send it in.

suggestions.hero.body.label: Suggestions page text
suggestions.hero.body.value: New server, event night, settings change, Discord improvement, odd little quality-of-life thing: if it would make MWN better, we want to see it.

dayz.legal.body.label: DayZ page content
dayz.legal.body.value:
From December 1st 2015, anyone who registers, is approved, and is listed on https://www.bohemia.net/monetization/approved/dayz is allowed following monetization of their DayZ private shard servers:

  • Charging players to access your server, if the fees and associated perks do not affect gameplay in any way, is allowed. Limiting access to only paying players is allowed.
  • Product placement, in-game advertising and sponsorship is allowed. Accepting donations is allowed, but not donating must not prevent anyone from accessing the content.
  • Selling of in-game items that do not affect gameplay and selling cosmetic perks are allowed.
  • These rules do not apply to public hive DayZ servers or the DayZ mod.

The permission is given for a limited time. It will expire on January 31st 2027.
